This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as milkweeds or dogbanes. The Asclepiadaceae family is part of the larger order Gentianales, which includes a diverse range of flowering plants. Within the order Gentianales, the family Asclepiadaceae is also known as Apocynaceae in some classifications. Gastrosiphon aundensis is a unique species within its classification.

It has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
